issue.title: Duplicate rules in RussianFilter (specific.txt)
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer;
- [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed;
- [x] This is not an ad/bug report.

### Problem description


These rules appear multiple times in the list.

- [ ] ##.branding
- [ ] ##.creative-placeholder-v2
- [ ] ##.video__topline
- [ ] ##div[class*="-adv"]
- [ ] ##div[class*="banner"]
- [ ] ##div[class^="banner-top"]
- [ ] ##div[data-component="se-game-app"]
- [ ] ##div[id^="div_sf_"]
- [ ] ##div[id^="unit_"]
- [ ] ##noindex > div[align="center"]

- [ ] #dle-content > noindex:has(> div.hblock > div[id*="ScriptRoot"])
```
comandir.com###dle-content > noindex:has(> div.hblock > div[id*="ScriptRoot"])
comandir.com#?##dle-content > noindex:has(> div.hblock > div[id*="ScriptRoot"])
```








### Proposed solution

Merge or remove rules if possible.

### Additional information

_No response_

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://mail.yahoo.com/d/folders/1/messages/AAEyMr7NkMok75BVwhcUx2lDezT](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmail.yahoo.com%2Fd%2Ffolders%2F1%2Fmessages%2FAAEyMr7NkMok75BVwhcUx2lDezT) ### Comment > Adguard works great on all other sites. However, this site must have recently changed so that AdGuard and other blockers no longer block the right-side ad pane (see screenshot). I've tried using AdGuard's element selection tool to block the ad, but that only works until I refresh the page. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/timt3vtn6nksk8gc0s80ss880sco8ool20n0v56j6o.jpg?nc=1)

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.title: cn.bing.com
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://cn.bing.com/search?pc=MOZI&form=MOZLBR&q=zen%E6%90%9C%E7%B4%A2%E5%9B%BA%E5%AE%9A&rdr=1&rdrig=A09A3D5574754A3285A8BF9477B1681F](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcn.bing.com%2Fsearch%3Fpc%3DMOZI%26form%3DMOZLBR%26q%3Dzen%25E6%2590%259C%25E7%25B4%25A2%25E5%259B%25BA%25E5%25AE%259A%26rdr%3D1%26rdrig%3DA09A3D5574754A3285A8BF9477B1681F) ### Comment > When AdGuard is enabled, Bing Search fails to function correctly; the search results are either irrelevant or extremely limited, and website favicons on the left side do not display. However, when AdGuard is completely disabled from the main interface, Bing Search works normally, the AI search features trigger properly, the results are highly relevant, and website icons are displayed as expected. > > 当开启adguard时，bing搜索无法正常运行，搜索出来的结果与问题关联不大或者很少，并且左侧的网站的图标无法正常显示；当在软件的主界面完全关闭adguard时，bing搜索可以正常运行，弹出ai搜索，搜索结果关联性大，可以正常显示网站图标 ### Screenshots
